_meta.description: Promagen Scene Starters — 200 curated scene templates (25 free + 175 pro). Authority: prompt-builder-evolution-plan-v2.md §6

scenes.name: Dramatic Portrait
scenes.description: Moody studio portrait with dramatic lighting and cinematic feel

1.note: CLIP excels at moody portrait keywords

2.note: MJ portraits benefit from vertical AR

3.narrative: A dramatic portrait of a woman looking away in a dimly lit studio, bathed in moody cinematic lighting

lighting: single key light cutting through darkness

scenes.name: Fantasy Hero
scenes.description: Warrior in an enchanted forest at golden hour

1.note: CLIP handles fantasy+nature well with fidelity boost

2.note: MJ excels at fantasy character art

3.narrative: A samurai warrior standing confidently in an enchanted forest, golden hour light filtering through ancient trees

4.core: samurai warrior enchanted forest golden hour

lighting: shafts of amber light through canopy

scenes.name: Street Photographer
scenes.description: Night-time neon street scene with gritty atmosphere

1.note: CLIP renders neon well without fidelity terms

2.note: MJ neon street photography is excellent

3.narrative: A photographer walking through neon-lit city streets at night, vibrant signs reflected on wet pavement

scenes.name: Vintage Glamour
scenes.description: Classic Hollywood elegance in a candlelit palace

1.note: Daguerreotype is niche on CLIP

3.narrative: A young woman leaning against a marble column in a grand baroque palace, soft candlelight casting warm golden shadows

lighting: warm pools of candlelight on marble
flickering shadow patterns on gilded walls

scenes.name: Cyberpunk Character
scenes.description: Neon-lit hacker in a dystopian city

1.note: CLIP is strongest on cyberpunk+neon — flagship scene

3.narrative: A cyberpunk hacker channelling digital energy in a neon-drenched dystopian cityscape, ominous atmosphere and holographic interfaces

scenes.name: Enchanted Forest
scenes.description: Mystical tree of life in a magical woodland glade

1.note: Oil painting style reduces need for fidelity terms

2.note: MJ landscape + oil painting is exceptional

3.narrative: A magnificent tree of life standing in a sunlit enchanted forest, dappled light filtering through golden leaves, painted in rich oils

4.core: tree of life enchanted forest golden light

environment: ancient roots intertwined with glowing crystals
carpet of wildflowers beneath the canopy
lighting: shafts of golden light through dense foliage

scenes.name: Desert Ruins
scenes.description: Ancient civilisation ruins baking under desert sun

1.note: Matte painting + fidelity creates epic landscapes

3.narrative: Crumbling ancient ruins rising from a sun-scorched desert canyon, bathed in harsh midday light with mysterious shadows

environment: half-buried columns emerging from sand dunes
atmosphere: heat shimmer distorting the distant cliffs

scenes.name: Underwater Kingdom
scenes.description: Bioluminescent undersea realm with mythical creatures

1.note: Bioluminescence benefits from ray tracing terms

3.narrative: A mermaid gliding through a bioluminescent underwater reef kingdom, cool-toned light emanating from living corals and jellyfish

lighting: phosphorescent coral pulsing with inner light
deep blue shafts piercing from the surface

scenes.name: Space Vista
scenes.description: Starlit spacecraft overlooking a cosmic floating cityscape

1.note: Sci-fi concept art thrives with 8K and ray tracing

3.narrative: A sleek spaceship hovering above a floating city under starlight, serene and vast, rendered in monochromatic tones

environment: anti-gravity platforms connected by light bridges
nebula clouds swirling beyond the city edge
lighting: cold starlight reflecting off polished hull

scenes.name: Volcanic Fury
scenes.description: Raw volcanic power — erupting lava and dramatic skies

1.note: Hyperrealistic + fidelity creates photorealistic lava

3.narrative: A hyperrealistic volcano erupting with rivers of molten lava flowing across a dramatic landscape lit by fire and lightning

lighting: incandescent lava flows casting orange across ash clouds

scenes.name: Film Noir
scenes.description: Shadowy Victorian detective in a suspenseful noir setting

1.note: B&W reduces need for fidelity terms

3.narrative: A Victorian detective standing in a dimly lit parlor, sharp split lighting casting deep shadows, ominous black and white composition

lighting: venetian blind shadows striping the wall
single desk lamp pooling light on case files
atmosphere: the tick of a grandfather clock

scenes.name: Dreamscape
scenes.description: Surreal fairy floating through a moonlit dreamworld

1.note: Surrealist style doesn't need hyper-fidelity

3.narrative: A tiny fairy drifting through a surreal floating dreamscape bathed in pale moonlight, soft pastel colours and impossible architecture

4.note: Surrealist concept may be lost on plain parsers

scenes.name: Horror Scene
scenes.description: Unsettling creature in a blacklit crystalline cavern

1.note: Detailed horror benefits from fidelity boost

3.narrative: A terrifying demon creature emerging from the depths of a blacklit crystal cave, desaturated colours adding to the ominous dread

4.note: Blacklight UV may not parse on basic platforms

lighting: ultraviolet glow revealing hidden veins in crystal walls
atmosphere: something ancient stirring in the deep

scenes.name: Golden Romance
scenes.description: Couple bathed in golden hour warmth on a rooftop garden

1.note: Photography style doesn't stack well with fidelity terms

2.note: MJ golden hour portraits are stunning

3.narrative: A couple in love embracing on a lush rooftop garden at golden hour, warm amber light wrapping around them, romantic and intimate
3.note: NL excels at emotional romantic scenes

atmosphere: the world pausing for just this moment

scenes.name: Psychedelic Trip
scenes.description: Explosive kaleidoscopic energy in a bioluminescent forest

1.note: Psychedelic art thrives on chaos — fidelity dampens it

3.narrative: A luminous being of pure light radiating through a psychedelic mushroom forest, neon colours pulsing and swirling in kaleidoscopic patterns
3.note: NL can struggle with abstract chaos

environment: mushroom caps glowing with inner fire

scenes.name: Anime Action
scenes.description: Dynamic samurai warrior at an ancient Japanese temple

1.note: Anime style conflicts with photorealistic fidelity

2.note: MJ --niji flag is essential for anime

3.narrative: A samurai warrior in dynamic anime style standing before an ancient temple, volumetric light rays streaming through the scene
3.note: NL anime descriptions can be hit-or-miss

atmosphere: the moment before the blade falls

scenes.name: Oil Painting Still Life
scenes.description: Classical Dutch-master style flower arrangement

1.note: Oil painting style doesn't need fidelity boost

2.note: MJ still life painting is beautiful

3.narrative: A lush flower bouquet arranged on velvet fabric, painted in rich oil colours with soft overcast light and serene tranquillity

4.core: flower bouquet oil painting still life

materials: cracked varnish texture of old masters
lighting: soft window light falling across the arrangement

scenes.name: Concept Art Creature
scenes.description: Mythical dragon perched on a mountain peak

1.note: Concept art creatures benefit from 8K and detail terms

3.narrative: A mythical dragon with vast wings perched on a snowy mountain summit, dramatic lighting silhouetting its form against stormy skies

environment: ancient claw marks scored into granite
atmosphere: the weight of centuries in its gaze

scenes.name: Pixel Art Retro
scenes.description: Retro-futuristic robot in a neon arcade

1.note: Pixel art is low-res by design — fidelity contradicts

2.note: Square format for retro pixel grids

3.narrative: A chrome robot standing in a retro pixel-art neon arcade, LED strips casting colourful reflections on its metallic body
3.note: NL struggles to describe pixel aesthetic

4.note: Pixel art is well-known on basic platforms

lighting: CRT screen glow on chrome surfaces

scenes.name: Art Deco Poster
scenes.description: Elegant dancer in a grand palace with Art Deco styling

1.note: Art Deco is a graphic style — fidelity unnecessary

2.note: Poster format works with vertical AR

3.narrative: An elegant ballerina dancing in a grand palace courtyard, Art Deco geometric patterns and gold leaf details, a single spotlight illuminating the performance

4.note: Art Deco is recognisable but niche

lighting: single cone of white light in dark grandeur

scenes.name: Solarpunk Utopia
scenes.description: Lush green futuristic city powered by nature and technology

1.note: Solarpunk architecture benefits from detail fidelity

3.narrative: A botanist tending a lush rooftop garden in a solarpunk city at golden hour, emerald foliage intertwined with gleaming solar technology

4.note: Solarpunk may not be known on basic platforms

atmosphere: technology and nature in perfect harmony

scenes.name: Dark Academia
scenes.description: Moody scholarly atmosphere in a candlelit library

1.note: Dark academia is moody — hyper-fidelity dulls the vibe

2.note: MJ captures dark academia mood perfectly

3.narrative: A student absorbed in ancient texts in a candlelit university library, dark academia aesthetic with leather-bound books and mahogany shelves

environment: leather-bound tomes stacked to the ceiling

scenes.name: Cottagecore Morning
scenes.description: Idyllic countryside cottage surrounded by wildflower meadows

1.note: Cottagecore is soft and painterly — not hyper-detailed

3.narrative: A charming countryside cottage surrounded by wildflower meadows at sunrise, soft pastel morning light and cottagecore warmth throughout
3.note: NL perfect for idyllic pastoral scenes

environment: smoke curling from a crooked chimney
atmosphere: the smell of fresh bread through an open window

scenes.name: Cozy Winter Night
scenes.description: Warm cabin interior with snow falling outside the window

1.note: Hyperrealistic winter scenes benefit from fidelity boost

3.narrative: A cozy cabin interior on a winter night, warm firelight dancing on wooden walls while snow falls gently outside frost-edged windows
3.note: NL perfect for sensory winter descriptions

4.core: cozy cabin winter fire snow night
4.note: Universally understood — high affinity across all platforms

lighting: frost crystals catching the warm glow

scenes.name: Synthwave Sunset
scenes.description: Retro-futuristic neon grid horizon at electric sunset

1.note: Synthwave is stylised — fidelity terms undermine the aesthetic

3.narrative: A sleek spaceship hovering above a synthwave sunset beach, neon pink and teal light reflecting off chrome surfaces and grid-patterned water
3.note: NL handles synthwave but less precisely

4.note: Synthwave is niche on basic parsers

lighting: infinite neon grid vanishing to the horizon
chrome reflections of electric pink sky
